title: desmoschoenus spiralis
intro: Desmoschoenus spiralis, also known as the New Zealand flax lily, is a perennial plant species native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Desmoschoenus spiralis can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or as a tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
